subject: New Opening: Software Engineer – Fintech
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: Payloop
ROLE: Mid Software Engineer
START: ASAP
DURATION: TBD
LOCATION: Stockholm / on-site
RATE: 750 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Java, Docker, Redis and Pub/Sub.

Key requirements:

  • Java
  • Docker
  • Redis
  • Pub/Sub

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Marcus Holm
IT Recruitment Specialist
TechLink Sweden
Tel: +46 70 234 56 78
